name: Walking Bass
descs:
[Effects apply only to #3 Deployed Identity]

Turn Start: Gain 1 [TensionUp]

On Hit, 25% chance to apply 1 [TensionUp] on self and 1 random ally
- If it was a Skill that inflicts [Laceration] or [Combustion](includes Potency, Count, and Unique variants), raise the chance to 50%

[Effects apply only to #3, #4 Deployed Identities]

Turn Start: Gain 1 [TensionUp]

On Hit, 25% chance to apply 1 [TensionUp] on self and 1 random ally
- If it was a Skill that inflicts [Laceration] or [Combustion](includes Potency, Count, and Unique variants), raise the chance to 75%

[Effects apply only to #3, #4 Deployed Identities]

Turn Start: Gain 1 [TensionUp]

On Hit, 25% chance to apply 1 [TensionUp] on self and 2 random allies
- If it was a Skill that inflicts [Laceration] or [Combustion](includes Potency, Count, and Unique variants), raise the chance to 100%
